scheme_name: Food Bill Assistance to SC Students
page_title: Food Bill Assistance to SC Students

details: The “Food Bill Assistance to SC Students” scheme is administered by the Director, Scheduled Caste Welfare, Government of Gujarat. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to the Scheduled Caste (SC) students who are admitted in college affiliated hostels for food bill. The students will be eligible for food bill assistance up to 10 months in a year.
benefits: The food bill assistance @ ₹1,500/- per month (Up to 10 Months) will be granted to the Scheduled Caste (SC) students admitted in college affiliated hostels.
eligibility: 1. The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat.
2. The students should reside in the hostel, affiliated to the college.
3. The annual family income of the student should be up to ₹6 lakhs.

online: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal:
On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page.
Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’.
After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password.
Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information.
After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP).
Now under services, select ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’.
Select the Financial Year in which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’.
Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’.
Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents.
Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’.
Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory.
The application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed.

Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for the Food Bill. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her all applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained.
In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities.
All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given.
The student has to fill his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully.
: The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject student applications.
Direct Individual submission of this application form will not be accepted in case of students studying inside the state.

documents_required: Caste Certificate from the Competent Authority
Income Certificate (Competent Authority) (Form no.16 required for Govt. Employee)
Break Affidavit (If Break Gap is more than One Year)
First Page of Bank Passbook/Cancelled Cheque
Death Certificate of Father (If Father not Alive)
issued by the Warden (For Hosteller Student Only)
(For Students Who take Leave Without Pay For Entire Duration of Course)
The Validity of the Income Certificate is 3 years. It is advised to check the Income Certificate issue date before uploading the document.

faqs.question: Who administers the "Food Bill Assistance to SC Students" scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is administered by the Director, Scheduled Caste Welfare, Government of Gujarat.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides financial assistance for food bills to Scheduled Caste (SC) students enrolled in college-affiliated hostels.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme offers food bill assistance at ₹1,500 per month for up to 10 months in a year.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the food bill assistance?
faqs.answer: Eligible candidates are Scheduled Caste (SC) students belonging to Gujarat, residing in hostels affiliated with colleges.

faqs.question: How many months of assistance can a student receive per year?
faqs.answer: A student can receive assistance for up to 10 months in a year.

faqs.question: Is there any specific income criterion for eligibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, the annual family income of the student should not exceed ₹6 lakhs.

faqs.question: How can eligible students apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible students can apply for the scheme through the Digital Gujarat Portal: https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee for applying to the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, there is no application fee for applying to the scheme.
